COURT ORDERS PETN PAY RESP TAXABLE SPOUSAL SUPPORT OF $8000 PER MONTH FOR FOUR MONTHS. COURT RESERVES JURISDICTION OVER THE DIFFERENCE BETWEEN THE $6600 NON-TAXABLE AM
OUNT AND THE $8000 PAYABLE FOR NOVEMBER/DECEMBER 1999. PETN SPOUSAL SUPPORT PAYMENT IS CONDITIONED UPON PETN MEETING WITH SUSAN STEVENSON FOR THREE
HALL PREPARE AN OVERVIEW OF THE 1999 INCOME AND THE BEST WAY TO FILE TAXES. EXPERT SHALL NOT PREPARE THE TAX RETURN DUE TO A CONFLICT WILL NOT
HE PAYMENT CHECK TO RESP. RESP SHALL PAY THE MORTGAGE AND SEND A COPY OF PAYMENT CHECK TO PETN. PETN SISTER IS TO DELIVER ALL NECESSARY RECORDS IN
ARE RESERVED. RESP SHALL BE GIVEN AT LEAST 5 DAYS OR MORE NOTICE RE MOVERS. EACH PARTY TO SHARE THE DR. BILLS, BALLET (MAXIMUM $40) AND PIANO

COURT ORDERS FATHER PAY MOTHER FAMILY SUPPORT IN THE AMOUNT OF $6000 PER MONTH FOR THREE MONTHS COMMENCING 6/1/00. THE FIRST PAYMENT IS TO BE MADE 7/1/00 AND ARREARAGE
S TO BE PAID FROM THE PROCEEDS OF THE SALE OF THE HOME. COURT ORDERS MR. THORNTON SHALL LIST THE PROPERTY FOR SALE FOR 120 DAYS; IF PROPERTY IS NOT
PM THROUGH SUNDAY AT 6:00 PM. EACH PARTY MAY HAVE AN ADDITIONAL TWO WEEKS WITH MINOR. NEITHER PARTY SHALL DRIVE WITH A MEASURABLE AMOUNT OF ALCOHOL
S FOR EACH VAN IN HIS POSSESSION. MOTHER SHALL CHOOSE A MEDICAL EVALUATOR AND INFORM RESP. RESP SHALL PAY PETN COUNSEL $5000 FOR ATTORNEY FEES AS
SOON AS POSSIBLE. MATTER IS CONTINUED TO 7/25/00 AT 9:00 AM AND 9:30 AM RE CUSTODY AND REVIEW. (404-GRANT) MARY VISCIGLIO CSR #10391ORNEY FEES AS

E AND ADDITIONAL DEBT, PARTIES TO DECIDE ON OWN IF THEY WISH TO SET ASIDE MONEY. COURT SHALL ALSO KEEP $17,758 IN ACCOUNT FOR NEXT 2 WEEKS. PARTIES TO
